name: Infisical (npx)
description: Manage Infisical secrets, projects, environments, and folders through the Infisical API. Authenticates with a machine identity using Infisical Universal Auth.

inputs.label: Universal Auth Client ID
inputs.description: The Client ID of an Infisical machine identity configured with Universal Auth. Find it on the machine identity's Universal Auth settings.

obtain.instructions:
1. Open your Infisical organization
2. Go to Access Control > Identities
3. Create (or open) a machine identity and add the Universal Auth method
4. Grant it access to the project(s) you need
5. Copy the Client ID from the Universal Auth configuration

inputs.label: Universal Auth Client Secret
inputs.description: The Client Secret of the Infisical machine identity's Universal Auth. Generated once when you create a client secret on the identity - copy it immediately.

obtain.instructions:
1. Open the same machine identity in Access Control > Identities
2. Under Universal Auth, click 'Create Client Secret'
3. Copy the generated Client Secret immediately (it is shown only once)

inputs.label: Infisical Host URL
inputs.description: Base URL of your Infisical instance. Leave as the default for Infisical Cloud, or set it to your self-hosted instance URL.

auth.instructions: Create a machine identity in Infisical (Access Control > Identities), add the Universal Auth method, and use its Client ID and Client Secret. For self-hosted instances also set INFISICAL_HOST_URL.
